lockedMessage: [DE] Trip Memory is part of Explorer (Plus). Upgrade to create a shareable memory when you finish a trip.
createToggle: [DE] Create a memory of this trip
notFound: [DE] No memory saved for this trip.
upgradeShareJournal: [DE] Upgrade to Explorer to share your memory card and keep a journal.
entryPlaceholder: [DE] Write a moment from your trip…
communitySectionSubtitle: [DE] Publish this completed trip to the Community feed. Add a tip and tags so others can discover your route.
communityTipPlaceholder: [DE] What should the next traveler know?
communitySectionSubtitleUpdate: [DE] Edit your tip, tags, or travel style, then tap Update Community. Your feed listing will match this trip’s itinerary and cover photo.
communityUpdatedBody: [DE] Your route on the Community tab now reflects your changes.
communityTipRequired: [DE] Add a short tip before publishing.
communityPlacesRequired: [DE] Add at least one place to your itinerary before publishing.
communityPublishedBody: [DE] Your trip is now on the Community feed.
communityPublishError: [DE] Could not publish. Please try again.
communityPublishedBadgeBody: [DE] Travelers can discover this route in the Community tab.
